content.en:
"Guys, do you still want to fight?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Time waved his hand and said, "Lord of Endless, we admit defeat!"

Ye Tianguang injured them with one punch with the Extreme Dao Ancestral Body, if he really shot with all his strength, it would be enough to kill them in an instant.

If they are not interested and continue to fight, then they will offend Ye Tian, there is no need for that.

Knowing that Ye Tian's strength was far superior to theirs, they simply admitted defeat.

Seeing that the Lord of Time had admitted defeat, the Lord of the Daoless Dao directly announced that Ye Tian had won.

"Since the Lord of Infinity has won, then I declare the Lord of Infinity to be the Lord of Tower No. 14 of the Daoless Tower!"

The Lord of the Pathless declares.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

One tower master congratulated Ye Tian one after another.

Moreover, all the tower masters could see that Ye Tian's strength was too demonic, and if he was really promoted to the perfect controller of the Void Realm, his strength would completely surpass that of the Infinite Realm Perfect Controller of the Daoless Tower.

Therefore, they naturally wanted to have a good relationship with Ye Tian.

Then, the Lord of the Ancient said: "Lord of Endless, the news that you have become the fourteenth tower master of the Daoless Tower will spread, and an inauguration feast will be held at that time, and we will invite the forces that have a good relationship with the Daoless Tower, and at the same time let you see those strong people." "

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Not long after, the news that Ye Tian had become the fourteenth tower master of the Daoless Tower completely spread and was known by many forces.

Suddenly, the ruins of eternity were shocked.

Although Ye Tian was known by many forces because of his comprehension of a variety of extreme paths before, and his reputation was very great, but at that time, Ye Tian was a half-step perfect controller of the extreme realm, even if he was evil, he could not enter the eyes of the perfect controller of the three realms for the time being.

But now it's different, Ye Tian has actually become the fourteenth tower master of the Wudao Tower, and his status is completely different.

One of the tower masters of the Daoless Tower, even if he was placed in the entire Eternal Ruins, belonged to the absolute top level.

At this time, many forces such as the Unknown Mountain, the Eternal Pavilion, the Xuannu Sect, the Boundless Chamber of Commerce, and the Time and Space Exchange were all very curious about Ye Tian.

Because the Daoless Tower will not casually let a perfect controller serve as the tower master, even several super perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower still have no hope of becoming the owner of the fourteenth tower of the Daoless Tower.

But now, Ye Tian has become the fourteenth tower master of the Daoless Tower.

......

Xuannu Sect.

At this time, the Great Elder of the Xuannu Sect, the perfect controller of the True Realm, the Lord of Bei Yao, was a little surprised when he heard the news of the Wudao Tower.

"I remember that this Infinite Lord was still a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, did he become a super perfect master so quickly?"

The Lord of Beiyao was shocked.

She knew very well that with the requirements of the Wudao Tower for the tower master, it was impossible to casually let a super-perfect controller become a tower master, and it must be that Ye Tian's strength was at a very strong level among the super-perfect masters.

"Ye Tian of the Wudao Tower is too demonic, they are so lucky!"

The Lord of Beiyao muttered.

Boundless Chamber of Commerce.

When the Lord of Boundlessness learned that a new tower master had been born in the Pathless Tower, he immediately went to congratulate the Lord of the Ancients.

"Canggu, your Infinite Dao Tower actually let a new perfect master become a tower master, what kind of ability does this Endless Lord have? Even if he has comprehended several extreme paths, it is only a preliminary comprehension, the realm of the extreme path is definitely not high, and the combat power should not be very strong!"

"The Lord of Boundless, the Lord of Endless has a high talent potential, and with the unanimous consent of all the Daoless Towers, this is why he has become the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower!" said the Lord of the Ancients.

Naturally, he wouldn't tell the truth, even if he had a good relationship with the Lord of Canggu, he wouldn't really reveal the true information.

"Canggu, you're still fooling me, forget it, forget it if you don't want to say it, anyway, I know that the strength of this Endless Lord has improved too quickly, which is somewhat beyond my expectations. In the future, I am afraid that your Infinite Dao Tower will really give birth to another Extreme Realm Perfect Controller!"

"Hahaha, I hope so, but how can it be so easy to become the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, not only talent, but also a great opportunity!"

Soon after, many of the Three Realms Perfect Masters began to pay attention to Ye Tian, the Endless Lord, although they didn't know the specific situation, they all knew very well that Ye Tian's strength was not simple, and his talent was too high.

Some of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who have a bad relationship with the Daoless Pagoda also have bad thoughts in their hearts, but they can't do anything for a while.

......

"My little junior brother is too demonic, it's only been a long time, and he has become the fourteenth tower master of the Wudao Tower!!"

The Black Decay Controller was shocked.

I think that at the beginning, Ye Tian was still extremely weak compared to him, but after coming to the Eternal Ruins, Ye Tian rose rapidly, and he didn't even have the qualifications to look up.

Now, he has only cultivated to the realm of the top half-step perfect controller, and Ye Tian has already become a super-level perfect controller, and his strength is above many perfect controllers in the Wudao Tower.

"Compared with the little junior brother, it's just too hard, and it still can't be compared!"

The Black Decay Ruler muttered.

And Ye Tian's master, the Ten Elements Ancestor, naturally knew that Ye Tian had become the owner of the No. 14 Tower of the Daoless Tower, and he was immediately full of emotion.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian had reached a level that was difficult for him to look up to.

He was very pleased, after all, Ye Tiannai was his disciple!

......

"Endless Lord Ye Tian, he has become the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower of the Daoless Tower???"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was extremely surprised.

Before, when he met Ye Tian, Ye Tian was still in the realm of the Extreme Creation Realm half-step Perfect Controller, but he didn't expect the other party to break through so quickly, and to be able to rank as the fourteenth tower master of the Wudao Tower, his cultivation must have reached the realm of a super-perfect controller.

"I think it's time to cooperate with Ye Tian!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said secretly.

He was going to enter there with Ye Tian and develop the resources there.

If the two join forces, there is a hope that they will avoid the powerful Extreme Creatures there, and then go deep into the black ocean in search of more goodies.

"I have Ye Tian's contact information, why don't you contact the other party first?"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord thought to himself.

So, he contacted Ye Tian.

But after contacting him, when he said that he wanted to cooperate with him, Ye Tian directly refused.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, I'm sorry, I'm not interested in cooperating with you. And you're not qualified to work with me!!"

As soon as this sentence was said, it directly made the stone dragon demon lord furious.
